message:
feat(demo): enhance showcase app with new screens and capabilities

Major updates to the demo showcase application:

App framework (app.rs, +225 lines):
- Plugin architecture for screen registration
- Async screen initialization
- Screen transition animations
- Global keyboard shortcut handling
- Debug overlay improvements

Chrome improvements (chrome.rs):
- Theme-aware header/footer
- Breadcrumb navigation
- Status bar with system info
- Notification toasts

New lib.rs exports:
- Public API for embedding demo components
- Screen trait for custom screen implementations

Dashboard screen (dashboard.rs, +355 lines):
- Real-time system metrics display
- Animated charts and gauges
- Responsive layout with breakpoints
- Live data streaming demonstration

Macro recorder screen (macro_recorder.rs, +302 lines):
- Input event recording interface
- Playback controls with speed adjustment
- Macro editing and naming
- Export/import functionality

Visual effects screen (visual_effects.rs, +107 lines):
- Interactive effect demos
- Parameter adjustment controls
- Performance metrics display

Widget gallery (widget_gallery.rs):
- Badge widget showcase
- Updated input demonstrations
- Enhanced list examples

Theme system (theme.rs, +198 lines):
- Complete theme definition structure
- All semantic token assignments

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
